title: A Monkey in Winter
writer: Antoine Blondin, François Boyer, Michel Audiard
actors: Jean Gabin, Jean-Paul Belmondo, Suzanne Flon
plot: Albert is an inn owner who vowed never to drink again if he and his wife survived the war. They did, and the reformed alcoholic keeps his vow. But times have changed and soon after the war, Albert comes in contact with Gabriel, a ...
